title: thelypteris zayuensis
intro: Thelypteris zayuensis, also known as Zayu spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its small to medium size and distinctive frond structure. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Thelypteris zayuensis include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and promoting wound healing, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Traditionally, Thelypteris zayuensis is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical ointments, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
